Title: 1. Weapons
Content: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

Title: 2. Sinners
Content: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

Title: 3. Wuthering Heights
Content: A passionate and tumultuous love story set against the backdrop of the Yorkshire moors, exploring the intense and destructive relationship between Heathcliff and Catherine Earnshaw.

Title: 4. The Bride!
Content: In 1930s Chicago, Frankenstein asks Dr. Euphronius to help create a companion. They give life to a murdered woman as the Bride, sparking romance, police interest, and radical social change.

Title: 5. Frankenstein
Content: Dr. Victor Frankenstein, a brilliant but egotistical scientist, brings a creature to life in a monstrous experiment that ultimately leads to the undoing of both the creator and his tragic creation.

Title: 6. The Dark Knight
Content: When a menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman, James Gordon and Harvey Dent must work together to put an end to the madness.

Title: 7. Se7en
Content: Two detectives try to track down a serial killer who chooses his victims based on the Seven Deadly Sins.

Title: 8. Shutter Island
Content: Two US marshals are sent to a mental institution on an inhospitable island in order to investigate the disappearance of a patient.

Title: 9. Evil Dead Rise
Content: A twisted tale of two estranged sisters whose reunion is cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

Title: 10. The Batman
Content: When a sadistic serial killer begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, the Batman is forced to investigate the city's hidden corruption and question his family's involvement.

Title: 11. Knives Out
Content: When renowned crime novelist Harlan Thrombey is found dead at his estate just after his 85th birthday, the inquisitive and debonair Detective Benoit Blanc is mysteriously enlisted to investigate.

Title: 12. Abigail
Content: After a group of criminals kidnap the ballerina daughter of a powerful underworld figure, they retreat to an isolated mansion, unaware that they're locked inside with no normal little girl.

Title: 13. Poor Things
Content: An account of the fantastical evolution of Bella Baxter, a young woman brought back to life by the brilliant and unorthodox scientist Dr. Godwin Baxter.

Title: 14. Alien
Content: After investigating a mysterious transmission of unknown origin, the crew of a commercial spacecraft encounters a deadly lifeform.

Title: 15. Planet of the Apes
Content: In 2029, an Air Force astronaut crash-lands on a mysterious planet where evolved, talking apes dominate a race of primitive humans.

Title: 16. Alien: Romulus
Content: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonists come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.

Title: 17. Batman Begins
Content: After witnessing his parents' death, billionaire Bruce Wayne learns the art of fighting to confront injustice. When he returns to Gotham as Batman, he must stop a secret society that intends to destroy the city.

Title: 18. Blade Runner
Content: A blade runner must pursue and terminate four replicants who stole a ship in space and have returned to Earth to find their creator.

Title: 19. The Devil's Advocate
Content: An exceptionally adept Florida lawyer is offered a job at a high-end New York City law firm with a high-end boss - the biggest opportunity of his career to date.

Title: 20. The Mummy
Content: An ancient Egyptian princess is awakened from her crypt beneath the desert, bringing with her malevolence grown over millennia and terrors that defy human comprehension.

Title: 21. Nosferatu
Content: A gothic tale of obsession between a haunted young woman and the terrifying vampire infatuated with her, causing untold horror in its wake.

Title: 22. The VVitch: A New-England Folktale
Content: An isolated Puritan family in 1630s New England comes unraveled by the forces of witchcraft and possession.

Title: 23. The Invisible Man
Content: When Cecilia's abusive ex takes his own life and leaves her his fortune, she suspects his death was a hoax. As a series of coincidences turn lethal, Cecilia works to prove that she is being hunted by someone nobody can see.

Title: 24. The Visit
Content: Two siblings become increasingly frightened by their grandparents' disturbing behavior while visiting them on vacation.

Title: 25. Annihilation
Content: A biologist signs up for a dangerous, secret expedition in which the laws of nature don't apply.

Title: 26. Suspect Zero
Content: A mysterious serial killer is preying on other serial killers and one FBI agent suspects there may be more to the vigilante than the obvious characteristics.

Title: 27. Predator
Content: A team of commandos on a mission in a Central American jungle find themselves hunted by an extraterrestrial warrior.

Title: 28. Clayface
Content: A shape-shifting creature made of magical clay haunts Gotham City, alternating between villain and ally of Batman. Multiple tragic figures have taken on the Clayface mantle over the years.

Title: 29. Resident Evil
Content: A special military unit fights a powerful, out-of-control supercomputer and hundreds of scientists who have mutated into flesh-eating creatures after a laboratory accident.

Title: 30. The Others
Content: In 1945, immediately following the end of Second World War, a woman who lives with her two photosensitive children on her darkened old family estate in the Channel Islands becomes convinced that the home is haunted.

Title: 31. In Bruges
Content: After a job gone wrong, hitman Ray and his partner await orders from their ruthless boss in Bruges, Belgium, the last place in the world Ray wants to be.

Title: 32. Oddity
Content: A psychic medium attempts to uncover the truth behind her sister's murder at the site of the crime.

Title: 33. Stardust
Content: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man makes a promise to his beloved that he'll retrieve a fallen star by venturing into the magical realm.

Title: 34. Saw
Content: Two men awaken to find themselves on the opposite sides of a dead body, each with specific instructions to kill the other, escape or face the consequences. These two are the latest contestants in Jigsaw's games.

Title: 35. Constantine
Content: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, a demon hunter, to help her investigate her twin sister's mysterious death. As he digs deeper, he realizes that demons are trying to enter the human world.

Title: 36. The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
Content: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for 40 years by hacker Lisbeth Salander.

Title: 37. Batman
Content: The Dark Knight of Gotham City begins his war on crime with his first major enemy being Jack Napier, a criminal who becomes the clownishly homicidal Joker.

Title: 38. Highlander
Content: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents, a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled "Prize".

Title: 39. Silent Hill
Content: Rose Da Silva takes her adopted daughter, Sharon, to the town of Silent Hill in an attempt to cure her of her ailment. After a violent car crash, Sharon disappears and Rose begins a horrific journey to get her back.

Title: 40. The Lost Boys
Content: When a recently divorced mother and her two teenage boys move to a coastal town to stay with her father, it doesn't take long for the brothers to realize the area is a haven for something much more sinister than party-going surfers.

Title: 41. A Cure for Wellness
Content: A stockbroker unravels the terrifying secrets of a mysterious Swiss spa where guests never leave.

Title: 42. Dark City
Content: A man struggles with memories of his past, which include a wife he cannot remember and a nightmarish world no one else ever seems to wake up from.

Title: 44. Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
Content: In 1935, Indiana Jones is tasked by Indian villagers with reclaiming a sacred stone stolen from them by a secret cult.

Title: 45. Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
Content: After a family tragedy, three generations of the Deetz family return home to Winter River. Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life is turned upside down when her teenage daughter, Astrid, accidentally opens the portal to the Afterlife.

Title: 46. Bram Stoker's Dracula
Content: Centuries-old vampire Count Dracula comes to England to seduce his barrister Jonathan Harker's fiancée Mina Murray and wreak havoc in the foreign land.

Title: 47. Event Horizon
Content: A rescue crew is tasked with investigating the mysterious reappearance of a spaceship that had been lost for seven years.

Title: 48. Final Destination
Content: After getting a premonition about a plane crash on his school trip, Alex, a student, saves a few of his classmates. However, their situation gets complicated when death starts chasing them.

Title: 49. Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
Content: When the island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

Title: 50. Cape Fear
Content: A convicted rapist, released from prison after serving a fourteen-year sentence, stalks the family of the lawyer who originally defended him.

Title: 51. Venom
Content: A failed reporter is bonded to an alien entity, one of many symbiotes who have invaded Earth. But the being takes a liking to Earth and decides to protect it.

Title: 52. What Happens at Night
Content: A married American couple visits a snowy European town to adopt. At their eerie hotel, they meet odd characters - a chanteuse, businessman and faith healer. Reality blurs as they pursue the baby and question their lives.

Title: 53. Sleepy Hollow
Content: Ichabod Crane is sent to Sleepy Hollow to investigate the decapitations of three people; the culprit is legendary apparition The Headless Horseman.

Title: 54. Evil Dead
Content: Five friends head to a remote cabin, where the discovery of a Book of the Dead leads them to unwittingly summon up demons living in the nearby woods.

Title: 55. Interview with the Vampire: The Vampire Chronicles
Content: A vampire tells his epic life story: love, betrayal, loneliness, and hunger.

Title: 56. Coraline
Content: Wandering her rambling old house in her boring new town, a young girl discovers a hidden door to a strangely idealized version of her life that seems too good to be true.

Title: 57. Night Hunter
Content: A detective investigates a young woman's apparent escape from captivity. As missing person cases connect to a hidden network of abducted girls, a suspect is caught, yet doubts emerge about whether the real predator still remains unseen.

Title: 58. The Empty Man
Content: A retired cop links mysterious disappearances to a mystical urban legend.

Title: 59. The Phantom of the Opera
Content: A young soprano becomes the obsession of a disfigured and murderous musical genius who lives beneath the Paris Opéra House.

Title: 60. Doctor Sleep
Content: Years following the events of The Shining (1980), a now-adult Dan Torrance must protect a young girl with similar powers from a cult known as The True Knot, who prey on children with powers to remain immortal.

Title: 61. Beetlejuice
Content: The spirits of a deceased couple are harassed by an unbearable family that has moved into their home, and hire a malicious spirit to drive them out.

Title: 62. A Nightmare on Elm Street
Content: Teenager Nancy Thompson must uncover the dark truth concealed by her parents after she and her friends become targets of the spirit of a serial killer with a bladed glove in their dreams, in which if they die, it kills them in real life.

Title: 63. The Babadook
Content: A single mother and her child fall into a deep well of paranoia when an eerie children's book titled "Mister Babadook" manifests in their home.

Title: 64. The Elephant Man
Content: A Victorian surgeon rescues a heavily-disfigured and mistreated young man working as a sideshow freak, who gradually reveals his capacity for kindness, intelligence and sophistication.

Title: 65. Hannibal
Content: Living in exile, Dr. Hannibal Lecter tries to reconnect with now disgraced F.B.I. Agent Clarice Starling, and finds himself a target of revenge from a powerful victim.

Title: 66. Manhunter
Content: Former FBI profiler Will Graham returns to service to pursue a deranged serial killer dubbed "the Tooth Fairy" by the media.

Title: 67. It: Chapter Two
Content: Twenty-seven years after their first encounter with the terrifying Pennywise, the Losers Club have grown up and moved away, until a devastating phone call brings them back.

Title: 68. The Pale Blue Eye
Content: A world-weary detective is hired to investigate the murder of a West Point cadet. Stymied by the cadets' code of silence, he enlists one of their own to help unravel the case - a young man the world would come to know as Edgar Allan Poe.

Title: 69. Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
Content: When Jacob discovers clues to a mystery that stretches across time, he finds Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children. But the danger deepens after he gets to know the residents and learns about their special powers.

Title: 70. Underworld
Content: Selene, a vampire warrior, is entrenched in a conflict between vampires and werewolves, while falling in love with Michael, a human who is sought by werewolves for unknown reasons.

Title: 71. A Series of Unfortunate Events
Content: When a massive fire kills their parents, three children are delivered to the custody of cousin and stage actor Count Olaf, who is secretly plotting to steal their parents' vast fortune.

Title: 72. Death Becomes Her
Content: Two women vie for a man and the secret of eternal beauty.

Title: 73. Red Dragon
Content: A retired FBI agent with psychological gifts is assigned to help track down "The Tooth Fairy", a mysterious serial killer. Aiding him is imprisoned forensic psychiatrist Dr. Hannibal "The Cannibal" Lecter.

Title: 74. Jacob's Ladder
Content: Reminiscing about his dead son, a Vietnam War veteran attempts to uncover his past while suffering from a severe case of dissociation. To do so, he must decipher reality and life from his own dreams, delusions, and perceptions of death.

Title: 75. Edward Scissorhands
Content: The solitary life of an artificial man with scissors for hands is upended when he is taken in by a suburban family.

Title: 76. Wind Chill
Content: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays, but when they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they are preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.

Title: 77. Pandorum
Content: Two crew members of a spaceship wake up from hypersleep to discover that all their colleagues are missing. Despite this, it appears that they are not alone.

Title: 78. Låt den rätte komma in
Content: A bullied boy forms a unique friendship with his new neighbor, a peculiar girl with a dark secret.

Title: 79. Batman & Robin
Content: Batman and Robin try to keep their relationship together even as they must stop Mr. Freeze and Poison Ivy from freezing Gotham City.

Title: 80. The Crow
Content: The night before his wedding, musician Eric Draven and his fiancée are brutally murdered by members of a violent gang. On the anniversary of their death, Eric rises from the grave and assumes the mantle of the Crow, a supernatural avenger.

Title: 81. Fallen
Content: Homicide detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of serial killer Edgar Reese. Soon after the execution, the killings start again, and they are very similar to Reese's style.

Title: 82. Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street
Content: The legendary tale of a barber who returns from wrongful imprisonment to 1840s London, bent on revenge for the rape and death of his wife, and resumes his trade while forming a sinister partnership with his fellow tenant, Mrs. Lovett.

Title: 83. Hellboy
Content: A demon raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

Title: 84. The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
Content: Five friends head out to rural Texas to visit the grave of a grandfather. On the way they stumble across what appears to be a deserted house, only to discover something sinister within. Something armed with a chainsaw.

Title: 85. Batman Forever
Content: Batman must battle former district attorney Harvey Dent, who is now Two-Face and Edward Nygma, The Riddler with help from an amorous psychologist and a young circus acrobat who becomes his sidekick, Robin.

Title: 86. Carrie
Content: Carrie White, a shy, friendless teenage girl who is sheltered by her domineering, religious mother, unleashes her telekinetic powers after being humiliated by her classmates at her senior prom.

Title: 87. Young Frankenstein
Content: An American grandson of the infamous scientist, struggling to prove that his grandfather was not as insane as people believe, is invited to Transylvania, where he discovers the process that reanimates a dead body.

Title: 88. A Haunting in Venice
Content: In post-World War II Venice, Poirot, now retired and living in his own exile, reluctantly attends a seance. But when one of the guests is murdered, it is up to the former detective to once again uncover the killer.

Title: 89. The Dreadful
Content: The Dreadful follows Anne and her mother-in-law Morwen who live a solitary, harsh life on the outskirts of society - but when a man from their past returns, he will set off a sequence of events that become a turning point for Anne.

Title: 90. Batman Returns
Content: While Batman deals with a deformed man calling himself the Penguin wreaking havoc across Gotham with the help of a cruel businessman, a female employee of the latter becomes the Catwoman with her own vendetta.

Title: 91. Angel Heart
Content: In 1955 New Orleans, small-time private investigator Harry Angel is hired by a man who calls himself Louis Cypher to track down a singer named Johnny Favorite, but the investigation takes an unexpected and somber turn.

Title: 92. The Predator
Content: When a young boy accidentally triggers the universe's most lethal hunters' return to Earth, only a ragtag crew of ex-soldiers and a disgruntled scientist can prevent the end of the human race.

Title: 93. The Addams Family
Content: Con artists plan to fleece an eccentric family using an accomplice who claims to be their long-lost uncle.

Title: 94. The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 2
Content: After the birth of Bella and Edward's daughter, Renesmee, the Cullens gather werewolves, vampire clans, and other allies from around the world to protect her after a false allegation puts her life in danger.

Title: 95. Suspiria
Content: A darkness swirls at the center of a world-renowned dance company, one that will engulf the artistic director, an ambitious young dancer, and a grieving psychotherapist. Some will succumb to the nightmare. Others will finally wake up.

Title: 96. Dracula Untold
Content: As his kingdom is being threatened by the Turks, young prince Vlad Tepes must become a monster feared by his own people in order to obtain the power needed to protect his own family, and the families of his kingdom.

Title: 97. Salem's Lot
Content: An author returns to his hometown of Jerusalem's Lot in search of inspiration for his next book, only to discover that the townspeople are being attacked by a bloodthirsty vampire.

Title: 98. Crimson Peak
Content: A new bride investigates ghostly visions at a remote gothic mansion that holds dark secrets.

Title: 99. The Craft
Content: A young girl new to a Catholic school befriends a coven of witches whom the other students either shun or fear. But when a powerful invocation goes wrong, the consequences could endanger their lives.

Title: 100. Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
Content: Set in 1998, this origin story explores the secrets of the mysterious Spencer Mansion and the ill-fated Raccoon City.

Title: 101. Taking Lives
Content: A murder spree in Montreal, with the killer embracing his victims' identities, leads to an investigation by the FBI agent Illeana Scott. Her bond with an art dealer is crucial to solving the case.

Title: 102. Halloween Ends
Content: A cascade of violence and terror forces Laurie Strode to confront the evil she can't control.

Title: 103. Malignant
Content: Madison is paralyzed by shocking visions of grisly murders, and her torment worsens as she discovers that these waking dreams are in fact terrifying realities.

Title: 104. The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
Content: Danger once again lurks for Bella, with a malicious vampire seeking revenge. Amidst the turmoil, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing the decision could trigger a battle between them.

Title: 105. What Lies Beneath
Content: The wife of a university research scientist believes that her lakeside Vermont home is haunted by a ghost - or that she is losing her mind.

Title: 106. Child's Play
Content: A dying serial killer transfers his consciousness into a popular kids doll using voodoo. A struggling single mother gifts her six-year-old son the much sought-after doll for his birthday, and the doll slowly begins to show its true colors.

Title: 107. Tim Burton's the Nightmare Before Christmas
Content: Jack Skellington, king of Halloween Town, discovers Christmas Town, but his attempts to bring Christmas to his home causes confusion.

Title: 108. Friday the 13th
Content: A group of teenage camp counselors attempt to re-open an abandoned summer camp with a tragic past, but they are stalked by a mysterious, relentless killer.

Title: 109. Hellboy
Content: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

Title: 110. Hostel
Content: Three backpackers head to a Slovak city that promises to meet their hedonistic expectations, with no idea of the hell that awaits them.

Title: 111. The Skeleton Key
Content: A hospice nurse working at a New Orleans plantation home finds herself entangled in a mystery involving the house's dark past.

Title: 112. The Hunchback of Notre Dame
Content: A deformed bell-ringer must assert his independence from a vicious government minister in order to help his friend, a gypsy dancer.

Title: 113. Overlord
Content: A small group of American soldiers find horror behind enemy lines on the eve of D-Day.

Title: 114. Torden
Content: Fantasy adventure origin story about a young man discovering he has god-like powers based on ancient Norse mythology.

Title: 115. Wolf Man
Content: A family at a remote farmhouse is attacked by an unseen animal, but as the night stretches on, the father begins to transform into something unrecognizable.

Title: 116. Banpaia hantâ D
Content: In the year 12,090 AD, the dhampir hunter "D" is hired to rescue Charlotte Elbourne from the vampire nobleman Meier Link.

Title: 117. Snow White and the Huntsman
Content: In a twist to the fairy tale, the Huntsman ordered to take Snow White into the woods to be killed winds up becoming her protector and mentor in a quest to vanquish the Evil Queen.

Title: 118. Wuthering Heights
Content: A poor boy of unknown origins is rescued from poverty and taken in by the Earnshaw family where he develops an intense relationship with his young foster sister, Cathy.

Title: 119. Suspiria
Content: An American newcomer to a prestigious German ballet academy comes to realize that the school is a front for something sinister amid a series of grisly murders.

Title: 120. The Crow
Content: Soulmates Eric and Shelly are brutally murdered. Given a chance to save the love of his life, Eric must sacrifice himself and traverse the worlds of the living and the dead, seeking revenge.

Title: 121. Jane Eyre
Content: A mousy governess who softens the heart of her employer soon discovers that he's hiding a terrible secret.

Title: 122. The Secret Garden
Content: A young, recently-orphaned girl is sent to England after living in India all of her life. Once there, she begins to explore her new, seemingly-isolated surroundings, and its secrets.

Title: 123. Halloween
Content: Laurie Strode confronts her long-time foe, Michael Myers, the masked figure who has haunted her since she narrowly escaped his killing spree on Halloween night four decades ago.

Title: 124. Blood Red Sky
Content: A woman with a mysterious illness is forced into action when a group of terrorists attempt to hijack a transatlantic overnight flight.

Title: 125. Rebecca
Content: A self-conscious woman juggles adjusting to her new role as an aristocrat's wife and avoiding being intimidated by his first wife's spectral presence.

Title: 126. The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 1
Content: A wedding and honeymoon bring unexpected and shocking consequences for Bella and Edward, including new complications with Jacob.

Title: 127. From Hell
Content: In 1888 London, a Scotland Yard investigator searches for Jack The Ripper.

Title: 128. Renfield
Content: Renfield, Dracula's tortured henchman, is forced to capture prey for his master and do his every bidding. But now, after centuries of servitude, Renfield is ready to see if there is a life outside his boss's shadow.

Title: 129. Monster House
Content: Three teens discover that their neighbor's house is really a living, breathing, scary monster.

Title: 130. Ed Wood
Content: Ambitious but troubled movie director Edward D. Wood Jr. tries his best to fulfill his dreams despite his lack of talent.

Title: 131. Death Note
Content: A high school student named Light Turner discovers a mysterious notebook that has the power to kill anyone whose name is written within its pages, and launches a secret crusade to rid the world of criminals.

Title: 132. Blade: Trinity
Content: Blade, now a wanted man by the FBI, must join forces with the Nightstalkers to face his most challenging enemy yet: Dracula.

Title: 133. Pet Sematary
Content: After tragedy strikes, a grieving father discovers an ancient burial ground behind his home with the power to raise the dead.

Title: 134. Morbius
Content: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

Title: 135. Candyman
Content: The Candyman, a murderous soul with a hook for a hand, is accidentally summoned to reality by a skeptic grad student researching the monster's myth.

Title: 136. The Grudge
Content: An American nurse living and working in Tokyo is exposed to a mysterious supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before claiming their life and spreading to another victim.

Title: 137. The Brothers Grimm
Content: Will and Jake Grimm are traveling con-artists who encounter a genuine fairy-tale curse which requires true courage instead of their usual bogus exorcisms.

Title: 138. The Last Voyage of the Demeter
Content: A crew sailing from Varna (Bulgaria) by the Black Sea to England find that they are carrying very dangerous cargo.

Title: 139. El orfanato
Content: A woman brings her family back to her childhood home, which used to be an orphanage for handicapped children. Before long, her son starts to communicate with an invisible new friend.

Title: 140. The Dead Zone
Content: Five years after a traffic accident that left him in a coma, a man awakens to discover that he has the ability to foresee future events and even prevent tragedies from happening. Will these new abilities prove to be a blessing or a curse?

Title: 141. Wolf
Content: Publisher Will Randall becomes a demon wolf and has to fight to keep his job.

Title: 142. Ninja Assassin
Content: A young ninja turns his back on the orphanage that raised him, leading to a confrontation with a fellow ninja from the clan.

Title: 143. The Witches of Eastwick
Content: Three single women in a picturesque village have their wishes granted, at a cost, when a mysterious and flamboyant man arrives in their lives.

Title: 144. Christine
Content: A nerdish boy buys a strange car with an evil mind of its own and his nature starts to change to reflect it.

Title: 145. Nosferatu, eine Symphonie des Grauens
Content: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

Title: 146. What Ever Happened to Baby Jane?
Content: A former vaudeville child star torments her paraplegic sister, who eclipsed her as a movie star, in their decaying Hollywood mansion while desperately clinging to hopes of a comeback.

Title: 147. The Fog
Content: Local legend tells of a ship lured on to the rocks of Antonio Bay being enveloped by a supernatural cloud as it sank; the myth says that when this mysterious fog returns, the victims will rise up from the depths seeking vengeance.

Title: 148. The Last Witch Hunter
Content: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

Title: 149. The Beguiled
Content: The unexpected arrival of a wounded Union soldier at a girls school in Virginia during the American Civil War leads to jealousy and betrayal.

Title: 150. Flatliners
Content: Five medical students experiment with "near death" experiences, until the dark consequences of past tragedies begin to jeopardize their lives.

Title: 151. Fanny och Alexander
Content: Two young Swedish children in the 1900s experience the many comedies and tragedies of their lively and affectionate theatrical family, the Ekdahls.

Title: 152. Let Me In
Content: A bullied young boy befriends a young female vampire who lives in secrecy with her guardian.

Title: 153. Hansel & Gretel: Witch Hunters
Content: Brother/sister duo Hansel and Gretel are professional witch-hunters who help innocent villagers. One day they stumble upon a case that could hold the key to their past.

Title: 154. Sleepwalkers
Content: A mother and son move to a new town to prey on a young woman.

Title: 155. The Haunting
Content: Hill House has stood for about 90 years and appears haunted: its inhabitants have always met strange, tragic ends. Now Dr. John Markway has assembled a team of people who he thinks will prove whether or not the house is indeed haunted.

Title: 156. Vargtimmen
Content: While vacationing on a remote German island with his younger pregnant wife, an artist has an emotional breakdown while confronting his repressed desires.

Title: 157. Stonehearst Asylum
Content: When Dr Edward Newgate arrives at the asylum to begin his residency, he finds the Dr in charge has adopted unusual methods of treatment, methods that give his patients a lot of freedom. But cracks appear in the hospital's cheerful facade.

Title: 158. Mermaids
Content: An unconventional single mother relocates with her two daughters to a small Massachusetts town in 1963, where a number of events and relationships both challenge and strengthen their familial bonds.

Title: 159. The Invitation
Content: A woman learns the shocking and bloody truth about her family history while staying at an estate.

Title: 160. Max Payne
Content: Coming together to solve a series of murders in New York City are a police detective and an assassin, who will be hunted by the police, the mob, and a ruthless corporation.

Title: 161. Spiral: From the Book of Saw
Content: In this new chapter from the Book of Saw, a detective and his partner investigate grisly murders that are eerily reminiscent of the past.

Title: 162. Saw III
Content: Jigsaw abducts a doctor in order to keep himself alive while he watches his new apprentice put an unlucky citizen named Jeff through a brutal test.

Title: 163. The Awakening
Content: In 1921, England is overwhelmed by the loss and grief of World War I. Hoax exposer Florence Cathcart visits a boarding school to explain sightings of a child ghost. Everything she believes unravels as the 'missing' begin to show themselves.

Title: 164. Urban Legend
Content: A college student suspects a series of bizarre deaths are connected to certain urban legends.

Title: 165. Gojira
Content: After a dinosaur-like beast - awoken from undersea hibernation by atom bomb testing - ravages Tokyo, a scientist must decide if his similarly dangerous weapon should be used to destroy it.

Title: 166. The Clovehitch Killer
Content: A picture-perfect family is shattered when the work of a serial killer hits too close to home.

Title: 167. Cronos
Content: A mysterious device designed to provide its owner with eternal life resurfaces after four hundred years, leaving a trail of destruction in its path.

Title: 168. La cité des enfants perdus
Content: A scientist in a surrealist society kidnaps children to steal their dreams, hoping that they slow his aging process.

Title: 169. Halloween Kills
Content: Surviving victims of Michael Myers form a vigilante mob and vow to end his reign of terror.

Title: 170. Profondo rosso
Content: A jazz pianist and a wisecracking journalist are pulled into a complex web of mystery after the former witnesses the brutal murder of a psychic.

Title: 171. Haunted Mansion
Content: A single mom named Gabbie hires a tour guide, a psychic, a priest and a historian to help exorcise her newly bought mansion after discovering it is inhabited by ghosts.

Title: 172. The Sorcerer's Apprentice
Content: A protege of the magician Merlin must train his teacher's successor - an introverted but resourceful physics prodigy - in the art of sorcery to prevent the return of Morgana le Fay.

Title: 173. The Uninvited
Content: Anna returns home after a stint in a mental hospital, but her recovery is jeopardized by her father's new girlfriend and ghastly visions of her dead mother.

Title: 174. Dead Silence
Content: After his wife meets a grisly end, Jamie Ashen returns to his haunted hometown of Ravens Fair to find answers. His investigation leads him to the ghost of a ventriloquist named Mary Shaw who seems to have ties to his entire family tree

Title: 175. Das Cabinet des Dr. Caligari
Content: Hypnotist Dr. Caligari uses a somnambulist, Cesare, to commit murders.

Title: 176. Luther: The Fallen Sun
Content: Brilliant but disgraced detective John Luther breaks out of prison to hunt down a sadistic serial killer who is terrorising London.

Title: 177. Underworld: Evolution
Content: Picking up directly from the previous movie, vampire warrior Selene and the half werewolf Michael hunt for clues to reveal the history of their races and the war between them.

Title: 178. Deliver Us from Evil
Content: A lawman and a priest work together to battle demonic forces.

Title: 179. The Addams Family
Content: The Addams family face-off against a crafty reality-TV host while also preparing for their extended family to arrive for a major celebration.

Title: 180. Spawn
Content: An elite mercenary is killed, but comes back from Hell as a reluctant soldier of the Devil.

Title: 181. Arsenic and Old Lace
Content: Mortimer Brewster, a Brooklyn writer of books on the futility of marriage, risks his reputation after he decides to tie the knot. Things grow complicated when he learns that his beloved maiden aunts Abby and Martha are serial murderers.

Title: 182. House on Haunted Hill
Content: An amusement park mogul offers a group of diverse people $1,000,000 to spend the night in a haunted house with a horrifying past.

Title: 183. Phantom of the Paradise
Content: A disfigured composer sells his soul for the woman he loves so that she will perform his music, but an evil record tycoon betrays him and steals his music to open his rock palace, The Paradise.

Title: 184. Wuthering Heights
Content: A servant in the house of Wuthering Heights tells a traveler the unfortunate tale of lovers Cathy and Heathcliff.

Title: 185. The Prophecy
Content: Gabriel and other angels jealous of humanity wage war using a police detective and the soul of a Korean War veteran.

Title: 186. The Watcher in the Woods
Content: When a family moves to a country home, the young girls experience strange happenings that have a link to an occult event years past.

Title: 187. Hellboy: The Crooked Man
Content: Hellboy and a rookie B.P.R.D. agent in the 1950s are sent to the Appalachians, where they discover a remote community dominated by witches and led by the sinister local demon, the Crooked Man.

Title: 188. Tenebre
Content: An American novelist visiting Rome to promote his latest book is stalked and harassed by an obsessed fan who is committing a string of murders that appear to be tributes to his work.

Title: 189. Young Sherlock Holmes
Content: When assorted people start having inexplicable delusions that lead to their deaths, a teenage Sherlock Holmes decides to investigate.

Title: 190. Life as a House
Content: When a man is diagnosed with terminal cancer, he takes custody of his misanthropic teenage son, for whom quality time means getting high, engaging in small-time prostitution, and avoiding his father.

Title: 191. Stigmata
Content: When a young woman becomes afflicted by stigmata, a priest is sent to investigate her case, which may have severe ramifications for his faith and for the Catholic Church itself.

Title: 192. Ten Inch Hero
Content: An artist gets a job at a beachside sandwich shop, where she hangs out with a techie, a flirt, a rocker, a hippie, and a Wiccan.

Title: 193. Ginger Snaps
Content: Two death-obsessed sisters, outcasts in their suburban neighborhood, must deal with the tragic consequences when one of them is bitten by a deadly werewolf.

Title: 194. Darkman
Content: A brilliant scientist left for dead returns to exact revenge on the people who burned him alive.

Title: 195. Something Wicked This Way Comes
Content: In a small American town, a diabolical circus and its demonic proprietor prey on the townsfolk. Dark's Pandemonium Carnival arrives in Green Town.

Title: 196. The Company of Wolves
Content: A teenage girl in a country manor falls asleep while reading a magazine, and has a disturbing dream involving wolves prowling the woods below her bedroom window.

Title: 197. Kyûketsuki hantâ D
Content: When Doris Lang is chosen as the next bride for the vampire Count Magnus Lee, she will hire a mysterious vampire hunter known only as D in an attempt to escape her ill-gotten fate.

Title: 198. BloodRayne
Content: In the eighteenth century, a vampire escapes from the freak show, in which she once participated, and teams up with a group of vampire slayers to kill the man who raped her mother.

Title: 199. The Amityville Horror
Content: Newlyweds and their children battle a demonic presence in their home.

Title: 200. Batman: Mask of the Phantasm
Content: Batman is wrongly implicated in a series of murders of mob bosses actually committed by a new vigilante assassin.
